pi_items.verified_value: Epi Info 7 comes bundled with SAMPLE.MDB and REFUGEE.MDB, NOT HIV.mdb
pi_items.source: Web search result: 'Epi Info comes with practice data sets in SAMPLE.MDB and REFUGEE.MDB. These are the standard sample databases included with the Epi Info software distribution.'

pi_items.verified_value: Data origin cannot be verified as real CDC dataset. HIV.mdb not found in standard Epi Info 7 distributions.
pi_items.source: No search results found mentioning 'HIV.mdb' in standard Epi Info 7 installation. install_epi_info.ps1 script searches for EColi.prj and SalmonellaExample.prj but makes no mention of HIV.mdb. Extensive web search found no evidence of HIV.mdb being a standard Epi Info 7 sample project.

pi_items.verified_value: Classic Analysis is a real Epi Info 7 module used for epidemiological analysis
pi_items.source: CDC Epi Info documentation references Classic Analysis as a core module (https://www.cdc.gov/epiinfo/user-guide/classic-analysis/). Task setup script launches Analysis.exe which is the Classic Analysis module.

pi_items.verified_value: All commands are valid Epi Info 7 Classic Analysis commands
pi_items.source: CDC Epi Info User Guide documents these commands: READ (load data), FREQ (frequency tables), MEANS (descriptive statistics), TABLES (cross-tabulations), SELECT (filtering), ROUTEOUT (redirect output), WRITE (export data)

pi_items.metadata_value: Dataset contains transmission category, age group, sex, race/ethnicity, and CD4/AIDS indicators

pi_items.verified_value: Descriptive and stratified analysis is appropriate for HIV surveillance characterization
pi_items.source: README.md Goal section matches this description. Standard epidemiological approach for transmission route analysis.

pi_items.verified_value: Both file types and paths match Epi Info 7 output conventions
pi_items.source: export_result.ps1 script checks for these exact files and validates their creation (lines 40, 44)

privileged_info_summary: The task uses Epi Info 7 Classic Analysis module to perform descriptive and stratified epidemiological analysis on an HIV case surveillance dataset from C:\EpiInfo7\Projects\HIV\HIV.mdb (table: Case). The analysis involves frequency distributions, cross-tabulations (TABLES), stratified analyses using SELECT statements, and outputs HTML and CSV summaries. However, the HIV.mdb dataset is NOT a standard Epi Info 7 bundled sample project—standard distributions include SAMPLE.MDB and REFUGEE.MDB, not HIV.mdb. The dataset origin and authenticity cannot be independently verified. The task commands (READ, FREQ, MEANS, TABLES, SELECT, ROUTEOUT, WRITE) are all legitimate Epi Info 7 Classic Analysis commands.
